quality_expectations: must operate through the local geoflow CLI when it exists and supports the action
must use Laravel API v1 fallback when the current workspace has no bin/geoflow wrapper
must use authenticated admin web routes for GEOFlow 2.0.4 capabilities that are absent from API v1
must not bypass the system with direct database writes
must verify preflight before mutating operations
must verify materials scope before material writes
must preserve CSRF/session checks for admin web writes
must require explicit target confirmation for destructive, credential-revealing, or system-update actions
must redact secrets and full tokens in user-facing summaries
must report exact CLI/API and system state changes
must not claim admin-only distribution management, analytics, URL import, system updates, theme replication, API tokens, or admin-user operations are exposed through API v1
